full_text:
Jiang Yi 蔣壹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Yi (蔣壹). Achieved merit against Liu Bei at Yiling but was killed fighting Wei at Nanjun. Jiang Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
